textByHash.184e68596646b178bd44cb3013c34924b80bc86d: I've decided to keep open the rift. There is a part of it that is perfectly laid out for combat training and remnants of my subconscious remain in there. I want to show people the problems I have faced, so that they
textByHash.22aebbe906287fd1c1bb56daee91aa16c5c76393: Oh yeah. I was looking for the legacy of a civilisation that used to live down here.
textByHash.24c72849fb6fc6a41269d9c66a1bbad968390b52: I can't live with your rules any more, Mother.
textByHash.295515fa2c445b9ca27d3bcb3dbd73ed9fcc1d9c: returned home with peace of mind.
textByHash.2a340832f2103cc51042531628064dc2e718d773: You might find it harder now! At least one is bound to cause you some sort of threat. Be careful! There isn't much in the way of items or treasure down there, it's purely for practicing your combat!
textByHash.2dfceede2a7c557825bd0276595c679283f00864: suffer. As if it got some sort of empowerment from it. At least what ever it is, it doesn't want to reveal itself to the world yet...
textByHash.2e1f3f1c5d82db8f4d60c79972e9df583017b548: I'm tired of working hard for very little money. There's great wealth that's mine for the taking!
textByHash.438f5647d857c245cdf3c954330de9904b3011c0: Not really, just a few coins, which you're welcome to have.
textByHash.5cb4790d14e60ebc0957cb9d3c1847c374dbe460: I managed to find the remnants of the ancient civilisation that the stories talked about. It seems people used to worship a god there years ago in numbers far greater than a simple cult following. Sadly there is little
textByHash.84e528f5431532c97f3fbcff2f3da8dc98e5aec4: Father? Oh, I'm so sorry, can you ever forgive me?
textByHash.a78089312e9ed73b4660c98aa45386ad53fb4f9a: I'm fine, my memories are slowly returning. How's mother?
textByHash.a7daf925d2a69cdc00cc2518ee05459ca44652a5: remaining so I have nothing else to tell. As soon as I entered this area the ground swallowed me whole. I felt there was something watching, waiting. It's like there is some evil power under the ground that wanted me to
textByHash.bdf41ec5ea66823e81cf3dff2b3c2c0af894506b: I'm tired of your pathetic outlook. Good bye.
textByHash.dc39167aedfde1940d155fdc2ba620cf61988c3d: Thank you so much. I truly owe you for your help.
textByHash.dfa1969204f68d7c458f0e99f8b31f23991ec595: Hi. Thanks again for saving me, I'm so glad to be out of that horrible place. I was foolish to ignore my parents' warnings when I ran away that day. Luckily I've been able to patch things up with them so they've
textByHash.e7022554a6fbb5a414b0d5ee5fe069e8967ea870: Leave me... But I don't want to... How can you say that...
textByHash.f728efc4540541bc12faaa37bd724b09d33d1d71: may learn from them. You're welcome to go down there and practice fighting any time.
textByHash.fa98c1e6a527ed7874752e4d4e9207818561464e: Of course, if you enter the rift next to me, you'll find a large dungeon filled with four kinds of beasts. You will recognise them from the gauntlet in which you helped me.
